subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1919-12-30
subcodes.first_line: When I went to America, My fatigue was of such a degree that My voice could not reach more than a few meters. Of necessity, in gatherings of four or five thousands souls
subcodes.first_line_orig: وقتی به امریکا رفتم ضعفم به درجه ای بود که صدایم تا چند درعی نمیرسید ناچار در مجالس چهار پنج هزار
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of prayer
